raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's renewable energy goals should take into account the different ways disadvantaged communities are affected by climate change.",
    "The Modesto and Turlock Irrigation Districts have spent over $200 million to acquire solar and wind plants to meet state renewable energy requirements.",
    "SB 386 would allow the Modesto and Turlock Irrigation Districts to count their renewable hydro-electric energy towards their renewable procurement requirements.",
    "SB 386 would allow the districts to invest in energy storage solutions, gaining energy and fiscal management flexibility.",
    "The ability to utilize and count Don Pedro hydro as a renewable resource will save Modesto Irrigation District customers at least $14 million in the next ten years.",
    "Equity demands treating hydro energy as a renewable resource."
  ]
}
```
